payload.think: Let me start by creating the database schemas for the new features, then build out the backend routes and services.

function.name: WriteFile
function.arguments:
{"path": "/root/rmi/backend/database/user_auth_schema.sql", "content": "-- User Authentication & Platform Features Schema
-- =================================================

-- Enable extensions
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pgcrypto";

-- ============================================
-- USER AUTHENTICATION
-- ============================================

-- Main users table (extends Supabase auth)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    supabase_uid UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Basic info
    email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    username VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE,
    display_name VARCHAR(100),
    avatar_url TEXT,
    bio TEXT,
    
    -- Auth providers
    auth_provider VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'email', -- email, google, twitter, privy
    provider_id VARCHAR(255), -- ID from external provider
    
    -- Web3
    wallet_address VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    wallet_chain VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'solana',
    privy_did VARCHAR(255), -- Privy decentralized ID
    
    -- Status
    is_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_premium BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_admin BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    reputation_score INTEGER DEFAULT 100,
    
    -- Timestamps
    last_login_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- User social connections
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_social_connections (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    provider VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- twitter, google, discord, telegram
    provider_user_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    username VARCHAR(255),
    access_token TEXT,
    refresh_token TEXT,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, provider)
);

-- User sessions
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_sessions (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    session_token VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    ip_address INET,
    user_agent TEXT,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================
-- AIRDROP CHECKER & REWARDS
-- ============================================

-- Eligible wallets for airdrop (CRM V1 holders)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.airdrop_eligible_wallets (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    wallet_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    chain VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'solana',
    
    -- Verification
    held_crm_v1 BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    held_amount NUMERIC(20, 9),
    snapshot_date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    verification_tx_hash VARCHAR(255),
    verified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    
    -- Rewards
    reward_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'standard', -- standard, gold, platinum
    base_reward_amount NUMERIC(20, 9) DEFAULT 0,
    bonus_amount NUMERIC(20, 9) DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Status
    claimed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    claimed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    claimed_by UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Discount codes for Telegram services
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.discount_codes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    code VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    
    -- Discount details
    discount_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'percentage', -- percentage, fixed
    discount_value NUMERIC(10, 2) NOT NULL, -- 50.00 for 50%
    
    -- Usage limits
    max_uses INTEGER DEFAULT 3, -- 3 purchases as specified
    used_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    max_uses_per_user INTEGER DEFAULT 3,
    
    -- Validity
    valid_from TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    valid_until TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    
    -- Linked to wallet
    eligible_wallet_id UUID REFERENCES public.airdrop_eligible_wallets(id),
    
    -- Tracking
    created_by UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Discount code usage tracking
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.discount_code_usage (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    code_id UUID REFERENCES public.discount_codes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    order_id VARCHAR(255),
    discount_amount NUMERIC(10, 2),
    used_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Wallet verification attempts
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.wallet_verification_attempts (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    wallet_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    
    -- Verification method
    method VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- signature, transaction, third_party
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending, verified, failed
    
    -- Details
    message TEXT, -- Message that was signed
    signature TEXT,
    verified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================
-- SNITCH BOARD (FORUM)
-- ============================================

-- Forum categories (like subreddits)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_categories (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    slug VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    icon VARCHAR(100),
    color VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#3b82f6',
    
    -- Stats
    post_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    subscriber_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Settings
    is_private BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    requires_verification BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    allow_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    
    -- Moderation
    created_by UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    moderators UUID[] DEFAULT '{}',
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Forum posts
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_posts (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    category_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    author_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    
    -- Content
    title VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    content_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'markdown', -- markdown, html, text
    
    -- Media
    images TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    attachments JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    
    -- Engagement
    upvotes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    downvotes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    view_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    comment_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Status
    is_pinned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    
    -- Scam reporting (specific to RMI)
    is_scam_report BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    reported_wallet_addresses TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    reported_token_address VARCHAR(255),
    scam_type VARCHAR(50), -- rug_pull, honeypot, phishing, etc
    scam_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'reported', -- reported, verified, false_positive
    evidence_links TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    
    -- Timestamps
    last_activity_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Forum comments
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_comments (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    post_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    author_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    parent_comment_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_comments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Content
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    content_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'markdown',
    
    -- Engagement
    upvotes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    downvotes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Status
    is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_solution BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, -- Marked as best answer/solution
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Post votes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_votes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    post_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    vote_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, -- up, down
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, post_id)
);

-- Comment votes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_comment_votes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    comment_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_comments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    vote_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, comment_id)
);

-- User subscriptions to categories
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_subscriptions (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    category_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, category_id)
);

-- ============================================
-- EDUCATION LIBRARY
-- ============================================

-- Course/Content categories
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_categories (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    slug VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    icon VARCHAR(100),
    color VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#10b981',
    sort_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Stats
    content_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    total_views INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Educational content
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_content (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    category_id UUID REFERENCES public.education_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    
    -- Content
    slug VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    content_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'article', -- article, video, quiz, guide
    difficulty VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'beginner', -- beginner, intermediate, advanced
    
    -- Media
    thumbnail_url TEXT,
    video_url TEXT,
    attachments JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    
    -- Metadata
    estimated_read_time INTEGER, -- in minutes
    tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    keywords TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    
    -- Engagement
    view_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    like_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    completion_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Status
    is_published BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_premium BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, -- Requires subscription
    
    -- Authoring
    author_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    reviewed_by UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    
    -- Timestamps
    published_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- User progress tracking
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_progress (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    content_id UUID REFERENCES public.education_content(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Progress
    progress_percent INTEGER DEFAULT 0, -- 0-100
    is_completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    
    -- Engagement
    time_spent_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    last_position TEXT, -- For video: timestamp, for article: scroll position
    
    -- Quiz results (if applicable)
    quiz_score INTEGER,
    quiz_answers JSONB,
    
    last_accessed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(user_id, content_id)
);

-- User bookmarks
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_bookmarks (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    content_id UUID REFERENCES public.education_content(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    notes TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, content_id)
);

-- Content likes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_likes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    content_id UUID REFERENCES public.education_content(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, content_id)
);

-- ============================================
-- USER ACTIVITY & NOTIFICATIONS
-- ============================================

-- Activity log
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_activity (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    activity_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- login, post_created, comment, wallet_verified, etc
    entity_type VARCHAR(50), -- post, comment, wallet, etc
    entity_id UUID,
    metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
    ip_address INET,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Notifications
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.notifications (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Content
    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- reply, upvote, mention, system, reward
    title VARCHAR(200),
    message TEXT,
    link VARCHAR(500),
    
    -- Status
    is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    read_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    
    -- Source
    actor_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id), -- Who triggered the notification
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================
-- INDEXES
-- ============================================

-- Users
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email ON public.users(email);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_wallet ON public.users(wallet_address);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_provider ON public.users(auth_provider, provider_id);

-- Airdrop
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_airdrop_wallet ON public.airdrop_eligible_wallets(wallet_address);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_airdrop_claimed ON public.airdrop_eligible_wallets(claimed);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_discount_code ON public.discount_codes(code);

-- Forum
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_category ON public.forum_posts(category_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_author ON public.forum_posts(author_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_scam ON public.forum_posts(is_scam_report, scam_status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_created ON public.forum_posts(created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_activity ON public.forum_posts(last_activity_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_comments_post ON public.forum_comments(post_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_votes_post ON public.forum_votes(post_id);

-- Education
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_category ON public.education_content(category_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_slug ON public.education_content(slug);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_published ON public.education_content(is_published, published_at);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_progress_user ON public.education_progress(user_id);

-- Activity
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_activity_user ON public.user_activity(user_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user ON public.notifications(user_id, is_read, created_at DESC);

-- ============================================
-- TRIGGERS
-- ============================================

-- Update timestamps
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    NEW.updated_at = NOW();
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ language 'plpgsql';

CREATE TRIGGER update_users_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.users
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_forum_posts_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.forum_posts
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_forum_comments_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.forum_comments
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_education_content_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.education_content
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

-- Update post comment count
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_post_comment_count()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    IF TG_OP = 'INSERT' AND NEW.is_deleted = FALSE THEN
        UPDATE public.forum_posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = NEW.post_id;
    ELSIF TG_OP = 'UPDATE' AND OLD.is_deleted = FALSE AND NEW.is_deleted = TRUE THEN
        UPDATE public.forum_posts SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = NEW.post_id;
    END IF;
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_update_comment_count
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON public.forum_comments
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_post_comment_count();

-- SEED DATA
-- ============================================

('scam-reports', 'Scam Reports', 'Report and discuss crypto scams and rug pulls', '#ef4444', '🚨'),
('rug-pulls', 'Rug Pulls', 'Specific discussions about rug pull incidents', '#dc2626', '💀'),
('honeypots', 'Honeypots', 'Identify and analyze honeypot scams', '#f59e0b', '🍯'),
('phishing', 'Phishing Alerts', 'Phishing attempts and wallet drainers', '#3b82f6', '🎣'),
('general', 'General Crypto', 'General cryptocurrency discussions', '#10b981', '💬'),
('announcements', 'Announcements', 'Official RMI announcements', '#8b5cf6', '📢')
ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING;

-- Education categories
INSERT INTO public.education_categories (slug, name, description, icon, sort_order) VALUES
('crypto-basics', 'Crypto Basics', 'Fundamentals of cryptocurrency and blockchain', '📚', 1),
('wallet-security', 'Wallet Security', 'How to secure your crypto wallets', '🔐', 2),
('scam-prevention', 'Scam Prevention', 'Learn to identify and avoid scams', '🛡️', 3),
('defi-guides', 'DeFi Guides', 'Understanding decentralized finance', '💰', 4),
('trading-basics', 'Trading Basics', 'Introduction to crypto trading', '📈', 5),
('technical-analysis', 'Technical Analysis', 'Chart reading and indicators', '📊', 6),
('nft-guide', 'NFT Guide', 'Understanding NFTs and markets', '🖼️', 7),
('advanced-topics', 'Advanced Topics', 'Deep dives into complex topics', '🔬', 8)
ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING;

display.new_text:
-- User Authentication & Platform Features Schema
-- =================================================

-- Enable extensions
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pgcrypto";

-- ============================================
-- USER AUTHENTICATION
-- ============================================

-- Main users table (extends Supabase auth)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    supabase_uid UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Basic info
    email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    username VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE,
    display_name VARCHAR(100),
    avatar_url TEXT,
    bio TEXT,
    
    -- Auth providers
    auth_provider VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'email', -- email, google, twitter, privy
    provider_id VARCHAR(255), -- ID from external provider
    
    -- Web3
    wallet_address VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    wallet_chain VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'solana',
    privy_did VARCHAR(255), -- Privy decentralized ID
    
    -- Status
    is_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_premium BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_admin BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    reputation_score INTEGER DEFAULT 100,
    
    -- Timestamps
    last_login_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- User social connections
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_social_connections (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    provider VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- twitter, google, discord, telegram
    provider_user_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    username VARCHAR(255),
    access_token TEXT,
    refresh_token TEXT,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, provider)
);

-- User sessions
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_sessions (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    session_token VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    ip_address INET,
    user_agent TEXT,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================
-- AIRDROP CHECKER & REWARDS
-- ============================================

-- Eligible wallets for airdrop (CRM V1 holders)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.airdrop_eligible_wallets (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    wallet_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    chain VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'solana',
    
    -- Verification
    held_crm_v1 BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    held_amount NUMERIC(20, 9),
    snapshot_date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    verification_tx_hash VARCHAR(255),
    verified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    
    -- Rewards
    reward_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'standard', -- standard, gold, platinum
    base_reward_amount NUMERIC(20, 9) DEFAULT 0,
    bonus_amount NUMERIC(20, 9) DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Status
    claimed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    claimed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    claimed_by UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Discount codes for Telegram services
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.discount_codes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    code VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    
    -- Discount details
    discount_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'percentage', -- percentage, fixed
    discount_value NUMERIC(10, 2) NOT NULL, -- 50.00 for 50%
    
    -- Usage limits
    max_uses INTEGER DEFAULT 3, -- 3 purchases as specified
    used_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    max_uses_per_user INTEGER DEFAULT 3,
    
    -- Validity
    valid_from TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    valid_until TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    
    -- Linked to wallet
    eligible_wallet_id UUID REFERENCES public.airdrop_eligible_wallets(id),
    
    -- Tracking
    created_by UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Discount code usage tracking
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.discount_code_usage (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    code_id UUID REFERENCES public.discount_codes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    order_id VARCHAR(255),
    discount_amount NUMERIC(10, 2),
    used_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Wallet verification attempts
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.wallet_verification_attempts (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    wallet_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    
    -- Verification method
    method VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- signature, transaction, third_party
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending, verified, failed
    
    -- Details
    message TEXT, -- Message that was signed
    signature TEXT,
    verified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================
-- SNITCH BOARD (FORUM)
-- ============================================

-- Forum categories (like subreddits)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_categories (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    slug VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    icon VARCHAR(100),
    color VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#3b82f6',
    
    -- Stats
    post_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    subscriber_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Settings
    is_private BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    requires_verification BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    allow_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    
    -- Moderation
    created_by UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    moderators UUID[] DEFAULT '{}',
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Forum posts
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_posts (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    category_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    author_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    
    -- Content
    title VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    content_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'markdown', -- markdown, html, text
    
    -- Media
    images TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    attachments JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    
    -- Engagement
    upvotes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    downvotes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    view_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    comment_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Status
    is_pinned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    
    -- Scam reporting (specific to RMI)
    is_scam_report BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    reported_wallet_addresses TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    reported_token_address VARCHAR(255),
    scam_type VARCHAR(50), -- rug_pull, honeypot, phishing, etc
    scam_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'reported', -- reported, verified, false_positive
    evidence_links TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    
    -- Timestamps
    last_activity_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Forum comments
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_comments (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    post_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    author_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    parent_comment_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_comments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Content
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    content_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'markdown',
    
    -- Engagement
    upvotes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    downvotes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Status
    is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_solution BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, -- Marked as best answer/solution
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Post votes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_votes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    post_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    vote_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, -- up, down
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, post_id)
);

-- Comment votes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_comment_votes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    comment_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_comments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    vote_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, comment_id)
);

-- User subscriptions to categories
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.forum_subscriptions (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    category_id UUID REFERENCES public.forum_categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, category_id)
);

-- ============================================
-- EDUCATION LIBRARY
-- ============================================

-- Course/Content categories
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_categories (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    slug VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    icon VARCHAR(100),
    color VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#10b981',
    sort_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Stats
    content_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    total_views INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Educational content
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_content (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    category_id UUID REFERENCES public.education_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    
    -- Content
    slug VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    content_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'article', -- article, video, quiz, guide
    difficulty VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'beginner', -- beginner, intermediate, advanced
    
    -- Media
    thumbnail_url TEXT,
    video_url TEXT,
    attachments JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    
    -- Metadata
    estimated_read_time INTEGER, -- in minutes
    tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    keywords TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    
    -- Engagement
    view_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    like_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    completion_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Status
    is_published BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_premium BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, -- Requires subscription
    
    -- Authoring
    author_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    reviewed_by UUID REFERENCES public.users(id),
    
    -- Timestamps
    published_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- User progress tracking
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_progress (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    content_id UUID REFERENCES public.education_content(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Progress
    progress_percent INTEGER DEFAULT 0, -- 0-100
    is_completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    
    -- Engagement
    time_spent_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    last_position TEXT, -- For video: timestamp, for article: scroll position
    
    -- Quiz results (if applicable)
    quiz_score INTEGER,
    quiz_answers JSONB,
    
    last_accessed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(user_id, content_id)
);

-- User bookmarks
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_bookmarks (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    content_id UUID REFERENCES public.education_content(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    notes TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, content_id)
);

-- Content likes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.education_likes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    content_id UUID REFERENCES public.education_content(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(user_id, content_id)
);

-- ============================================
-- USER ACTIVITY & NOTIFICATIONS
-- ============================================

-- Activity log
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_activity (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    activity_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- login, post_created, comment, wallet_verified, etc
    entity_type VARCHAR(50), -- post, comment, wallet, etc
    entity_id UUID,
    metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
    ip_address INET,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Notifications
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.notifications (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Content
    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- reply, upvote, mention, system, reward
    title VARCHAR(200),
    message TEXT,
    link VARCHAR(500),
    
    -- Status
    is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    read_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    
    -- Source
    actor_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id), -- Who triggered the notification
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================
-- INDEXES
-- ============================================

-- Users
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email ON public.users(email);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_wallet ON public.users(wallet_address);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_provider ON public.users(auth_provider, provider_id);

-- Airdrop
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_airdrop_wallet ON public.airdrop_eligible_wallets(wallet_address);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_airdrop_claimed ON public.airdrop_eligible_wallets(claimed);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_discount_code ON public.discount_codes(code);

-- Forum
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_category ON public.forum_posts(category_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_author ON public.forum_posts(author_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_scam ON public.forum_posts(is_scam_report, scam_status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_created ON public.forum_posts(created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_posts_activity ON public.forum_posts(last_activity_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_comments_post ON public.forum_comments(post_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_forum_votes_post ON public.forum_votes(post_id);

-- Education
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_category ON public.education_content(category_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_slug ON public.education_content(slug);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_published ON public.education_content(is_published, published_at);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_education_progress_user ON public.education_progress(user_id);

-- Activity
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_activity_user ON public.user_activity(user_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user ON public.notifications(user_id, is_read, created_at DESC);

-- ============================================
-- TRIGGERS
-- ============================================

-- Update timestamps
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    NEW.updated_at = NOW();
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ language 'plpgsql';

CREATE TRIGGER update_users_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.users
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_forum_posts_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.forum_posts
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_forum_comments_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.forum_comments
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_education_content_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.education_content
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

-- Update post comment count
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_post_comment_count()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    IF TG_OP = 'INSERT' AND NEW.is_deleted = FALSE THEN
        UPDATE public.forum_posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = NEW.post_id;
    ELSIF TG_OP = 'UPDATE' AND OLD.is_deleted = FALSE AND NEW.is_deleted = TRUE THEN
        UPDATE public.forum_posts SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = NEW.post_id;
    END IF;
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_update_comment_count
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON public.forum_comments
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_post_comment_count();

-- ============================================
-- SEED DATA
-- ============================================

-- Forum categories
INSERT INTO public.forum_categories (slug, name, description, color, icon) VALUES

('rug-pulls', 'Rug Pulls', 'Specific discussions about rug pull incidents', '#dc2626', '💀'),
('honeypots', 'Honeypots', 'Identify and analyze honeypot scams', '#f59e0b', '🍯'),

INSERT INTO public.education_categories (slug, name, description, icon, sort_order) VALUES

{"path": "/root/rmi/backend/services/auth_service.py", "content": """"
Authentication Service
======================
Handles user authentication via email, X (Twitter), Google, and Privy (Web3)
"""
import jwt
import httpx
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any
import logging
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi')
from setup_supabase import supabase

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi/backend')
from config.settings import settings

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class AuthService:
    """Service for handling user authentication"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.supabase = supabase
        self.jwt_secret = settings.SECRET_KEY
        self.jwt_algorithm = settings.JWT_ALGORITHM
        
    # ==========================================
    # JWT TOKEN MANAGEMENT
    # ==========================================
    
    def create_access_token(self, user_id: str, expires_delta: Optional[timedelta] = None) -> str:
        """Create JWT access token"""
        if expires_delta:
            expire = datetime.utcnow() + expires_delta
        else:
            expire = datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(minutes=settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
        
        to_encode = {
            "sub": user_id,
            "exp": expire,
            "iat": datetime.utcnow(),
            "type": "access"
        }
        
        return jwt.encode(to_encode, self.jwt_secret, algorithm=self.jwt_algorithm)
    
    def verify_token(self, token: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Verify and decode JWT token"""
        try:
            payload = jwt.decode(token, self.jwt_secret, algorithms=[self.jwt_algorithm])
            return payload
        except jwt.ExpiredSignatureError:
            return None
        except jwt.JWTError:
            return None
    
    # ==========================================
    # USER MANAGEMENT
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_or_create_user(
        self,
        auth_provider: str,
        provider_id: str,
        email: Optional[str] = None,
        username: Optional[str] = None,
        display_name: Optional[str] = None,
        avatar_url: Optional[str] = None,
        wallet_address: Optional[str] = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get existing user or create new one"""
        try:
            # Check if user exists by provider
            existing = self.supabase.table("users").select("*").eq("auth_provider", auth_provider).eq("provider_id", provider_id).execute()
            
            if existing.data:
                user = existing.data[0]
                # Update last login
                self.supabase.table("users").update({"last_login_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}).eq("id", user["id"]).execute()
                return {"user": user, "is_new": False}
            
            # Create new user
            user_data = {
                "email": email,
                "username": username or f"user_{provider_id[:8]}",
                "display_name": display_name or username or "Anonymous",
                "avatar_url": avatar_url,
                "auth_provider": auth_provider,
                "provider_id": provider_id,
                "wallet_address": wallet_address,
                "last_login_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            }
            
            result = self.supabase.table("users").insert(user_data).execute()
            
            if result.data:
                return {"user": result.data[0], "is_new": True}
            else:
                raise Exception("Failed to create user")
                
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error in get_or_create_user: {e}")
            raise
    
    async def get_user_by_id(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get user by ID"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("users").select("*").eq("id", user_id).single().execute()
            return result.data
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting user: {e}")
            return None
    
    async def get_user_by_wallet(self, wallet_address: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get user by wallet address"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("users").select("*").eq("wallet_address", wallet_address).single().execute()
            return result.data
        except Exception as e:
            return None
    
    async def update_user(self, user_id: str, update_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
        """Update user data"""
        try:
            update_data["updated_at"] = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            self.supabase.table("users").update(update_data).eq("id", user_id).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error updating user: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def link_wallet_to_user(self, user_id: str, wallet_address: str, chain: str = "solana") -> bool:
        """Link wallet address to user"""
        try:
            # Check if wallet already linked to another user
            existing = await self.get_user_by_wallet(wallet_address)
            if existing and existing["id"] != user_id:
                raise Exception("Wallet already linked to another account")
            
            self.supabase.table("users").update({
                "wallet_address": wallet_address,
                "wallet_chain": chain,
                "updated_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            }).eq("id", user_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error linking wallet: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # GOOGLE AUTH
    # ==========================================
    
    async def verify_google_token(self, token: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Verify Google ID token"""
        try:
            async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
                # Get Google certs
                certs_resp = await client.get("https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v1/certs")
                certs = certs_resp.json()
                
                # Verify token
                # Note: In production, use google-auth library
                # This is simplified for demonstration
                header = jwt.get_unverified_header(token)
                kid = header.get("kid")
                
                if kid not in certs:
                    return None
                
                # Decode with Google's cert
                payload = jwt.decode(token, certs[kid], algorithms=["RS256"])
                
                return {
                    "provider_id": payload["sub"],
                    "email": payload.get("email"),
                    "username": payload.get("email", "").split("@")[0],
                    "display_name": payload.get("name"),
                    "avatar_url": payload.get("picture")
                }
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Google token verification failed: {e}")
            return None
    
    # ==========================================
    # TWITTER/X AUTH
    # ==========================================
    
    async def verify_twitter_token(self, access_token: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Verify Twitter/X access token and get user info"""
        try:
            async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
                headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}
                resp = await client.get(
                    "https://api.twitter.com/2/users/me?user.fields=profile_image_url,username,display_name",
                    headers=headers,
                    timeout=10.0
                )
                
                if resp.status_code == 200:
                    data = resp.json()["data"]
                    return {
                        "provider_id": data["id"],
                        "username": data["username"],
                        "display_name": data.get("name", data["username"]),
                        "avatar_url": data.get("profile_image_url")
                    }
                else:
                    logger.error(f"Twitter API error: {resp.status_code} - {resp.text}")
                    return None
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Twitter token verification failed: {e}")
            return None
    
    # ==========================================
    # PRIVY (WEB3) AUTH
    # ==========================================
    
    async def verify_privy_token(self, token: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Verify Privy ID token"""
        try:
            # Privy uses JWT tokens
            # In production, verify against Privy's JWKS
            # For now, decode without verification (token comes from trusted source)
            payload = jwt.decode(token, options={"verify_signature": False})
            
            # Extract wallet info from Privy token
            linked_accounts = payload.get("linked_accounts", [])
            wallet_address = None
            
            for account in linked_accounts:
                if account.get("type") == "wallet":
                    wallet_address = account.get("address")
                    break
            
            return {
                "provider_id": payload["sub"],  # Privy DID
                "privy_did": payload["sub"],
                "wallet_address": wallet_address,
                "email": payload.get("email")
            }
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Privy token verification failed: {e}")
            return None
    
    # ==========================================
    # WALLET VERIFICATION
    # ==========================================
    
    async def verify_wallet_ownership(
        self,
        wallet_address: str,
        message: str,
        signature: str,
        chain: str = "solana"
    ) -> bool:
        """Verify wallet ownership via signature"""
        try:
            # Store verification attempt
            attempt_data = {
                "wallet_address": wallet_address,
                "method": "signature",
                "message": message,
                "signature": signature,
                "status": "pending"
            }
            
            result = self.supabase.table("wallet_verification_attempts").insert(attempt_data).execute()
            attempt_id = result.data[0]["id"]
            
            # Verify signature based on chain
            if chain == "solana":
                is_valid = await self._verify_solana_signature(wallet_address, message, signature)
            elif chain == "ethereum":
                is_valid = await self._verify_ethereum_signature(wallet_address, message, signature)
            else:
                is_valid = False
            
            # Update attempt status
            self.supabase.table("wallet_verification_attempts").update({
                "status": "verified" if is_valid else "failed",
                "verified_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat() if is_valid else None
            }).eq("id", attempt_id).execute()
            
            return is_valid
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Wallet verification error: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def _verify_solana_signature(self, wallet_address: str, message: str, signature: str) -> bool:
        """Verify Solana signature"""
        try:
            import nacl.signing
            import nacl.exceptions
            import base58
            
            # Decode public key
            public_key_bytes = base58.b58decode(wallet_address)
            
            # Decode signature
            signature_bytes = base58.b58decode(signature)
            
            # Create verify key
            verify_key = nacl.signing.VerifyKey(public_key_bytes)
            
            # Verify
            message_bytes = message.encode('utf-8')
            verify_key.verify(message_bytes, signature_bytes)
            
            return True
        except nacl.exceptions.BadSignatureError:
            return False
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Solana verification error: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def _verify_ethereum_signature(self, wallet_address: str, message: str, signature: str) -> bool:
        """Verify Ethereum signature"""
        try:
            from eth_account import Account
            from eth_account.messages import encode_defunct
            
            # Encode message
            message_encoded = encode_defunct(text=message)
            
            # Recover address from signature
            recovered_address = Account.recover_message(message_encoded, signature=signature)
            
            # Compare (case-insensitive)
            return recovered_address.lower() == wallet_address.lower()
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Ethereum verification error: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # SESSION MANAGEMENT
    # ==========================================
    
    async def create_session(self, user_id: str, ip_address: str = None, user_agent: str = None) -> str:
        """Create new user session"""
        try:
            import secrets
            
            session_token = secrets.token_urlsafe(32)
            expires_at = datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=7)
            
            session_data = {
                "user_id": user_id,
                "session_token": session_token,
                "ip_address": ip_address,
                "user_agent": user_agent,
                "expires_at": expires_at.isoformat()
            }
            
            self.supabase.table("user_sessions").insert(session_data).execute()
            
            return session_token
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error creating session: {e}")
            raise
    
    async def validate_session(self, session_token: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Validate session token"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("user_sessions").select("*, users(*)").eq("session_token", session_token).single().execute()
            
            if not result.data:
                return None
            
            session = result.data
            expires_at = datetime.fromisoformat(session["expires_at"].replace('Z', '+00:00'))
            
            if expires_at < datetime.now(expires_at.tzinfo):
                return None
            
            return session["users"]
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Session validation error: {e}")
            return None


# Singleton
auth_service = AuthService()

import sys

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi')
from setup_supabase import supabase

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi/backend')
from config.settings import settings

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class AirdropService:
    """Service for managing airdrop eligibility and discount codes"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.supabase = supabase
        
    # ==========================================
    # ELIGIBILITY CHECKING
    # ==========================================
    
    async def check_wallet_eligibility(self, wallet_address: str, chain: str = "solana") -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Check if wallet is eligible for airdrop"""
        try:
            # Normalize address
            wallet_address = wallet_address.strip()
            
            # Check in eligible wallets table
            result = self.supabase.table("airdrop_eligible_wallets").select("*").eq("wallet_address", wallet_address).single().execute()
            
            if result.data:
                wallet_data = result.data
                
                # Check if already claimed
                if wallet_data.get("claimed"):
                    return {
                        "eligible": True,
                        "claimed": True,
                        "claimed_at": wallet_data.get("claimed_at"),
                        "claimed_by": wallet_data.get("claimed_by"),
                        "message": "This wallet has already claimed the airdrop"
                    }
                
                # Get associated discount codes
                codes_result = self.supabase.table("discount_codes").select("*").eq("eligible_wallet_id", wallet_data["id"]).execute()
                
                return {
                    "eligible": True,
                    "claimed": False,
                    "wallet": {
                        "address": wallet_data["wallet_address"],
                        "held_crm_v1": wallet_data.get("held_crm_v1"),
                        "held_amount": wallet_data.get("held_amount"),
                        "reward_tier": wallet_data.get("reward_tier"),
                        "base_reward": wallet_data.get("base_reward_amount"),
                        "bonus_reward": wallet_data.get("bonus_amount")
                    },
                    "discount_codes": codes_result.data or [],
                    "message": "Wallet is eligible for airdrop and discounts!"
                }
            else:
                # Wallet not in eligible list
                # Check if we need to verify on-chain
                return {
                    "eligible": False,
                    "claimed": False,
                    "message": "Wallet not found in eligible list. You must have held CRM V1 tokens during the snapshot.",
                    "can_verify": True
                }
                
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error checking eligibility: {e}")
            return {
                "eligible": False,
                "error": str(e),
                "message": "Error checking eligibility"
            }
    
    async def verify_wallet_on_chain(
        self,
        wallet_address: str,
        chain: str = "solana",
        verification_signature: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Verify wallet held CRM V1 by checking on-chain data"""
        try:
            # This would integrate with Helius/Arkham to check historical balances
            # For now, return mock verification structure
            
            if chain == "solana":
                # Check Solana blockchain for CRM V1 holdings
                held_amount = await self._check_solana_crm_v1_holdings(wallet_address)
            else:
                held_amount = 0
            
            if held_amount > 0:
                # Add to eligible wallets
                wallet_data = {
                    "wallet_address": wallet_address,
                    "chain": chain,
                    "held_crm_v1": True,
                    "held_amount": held_amount,
                    "verified_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
                }
                
                result = self.supabase.table("airdrop_eligible_wallets").insert(wallet_data).execute()
                
                if result.data:
                    wallet_id = result.data[0]["id"]
                    # Generate discount codes
                    codes = await self._generate_discount_codes(wallet_id)
                    
                    return {
                        "verified": True,
                        "held_amount": held_amount,
                        "discount_codes": codes,
                        "message": f"Verified! You held {held_amount} CRM V1 tokens."
                    }
            
            return {
                "verified": False,
                "held_amount": 0,
                "message": "No CRM V1 holdings found for this wallet during the snapshot period."
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"On-chain verification error: {e}")
            return {
                "verified": False,
                "error": str(e)
            }
    
    async def _check_solana_crm_v1_holdings(self, wallet_address: str) -> float:
        """Check historical CRM V1 holdings on Solana"""
        try:
            import httpx
            
            # CRM V1 token address
            CRM_V1_MINT = settings.TARGET_CA or "Eme5T2s2HB7B8W4YgLG1eReQpnadEVUnQBRjaKTdBAGS"
            
            # Use Helius to get token accounts
            helius_key = settings.HELIUS_API_KEY
            if not helius_key:
                logger.warning("Helius API key not configured")
                return 0
            
            async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
                url = f"https://api.helius.xyz/v0/addresses/{wallet_address}/balances?api-key={helius_key}"
                resp = await client.get(url, timeout=30.0)
                
                if resp.status_code == 200:
                    data = resp.json()
                    tokens = data.get("tokens", [])
                    
                    for token in tokens:
                        if token.get("mint") == CRM_V1_MINT:
                            return float(token.get("amount", 0)) / (10 ** token.get("decimals", 9))
            
            return 0
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error checking Solana holdings: {e}")
            return 0
    
    # ==========================================
    # DISCOUNT CODE MANAGEMENT
    # ==========================================
    
    async def _generate_discount_codes(self, wallet_id: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Generate discount codes for eligible wallet"""
        try:
            import secrets
            
            codes = []
            
            # Generate 1 code for 50% off (3 uses)
            code = f"CRM50-{secrets.token_hex(4).upper()}"
            
            code_data = {
                "code": code,
                "discount_type": "percentage",
                "discount_value": 50.00,
                "max_uses": 3,
                "used_count": 0,
                "max_uses_per_user": 3,
                "valid_from": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
                "valid_until": (datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=365)).isoformat(),
                "is_active": True,
                "eligible_wallet_id": wallet_id
            }
            
            result = self.supabase.table("discount_codes").insert(code_data).execute()
            
            if result.data:
                codes.append(result.data[0])
            
            return codes
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error generating discount codes: {e}")
            return []
    
    async def validate_discount_code(self, code: str, user_id: str = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Validate a discount code"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("discount_codes").select("*").eq("code", code).single().execute()
            
            if not result.data:
                return {"valid": False, "message": "Invalid discount code"}
            
            code_data = result.data
            
            # Check if active
            if not code_data.get("is_active"):
                return {"valid": False, "message": "Discount code is inactive"}
            
            # Check expiration
            valid_until = code_data.get("valid_until")
            if valid_until:
                expires = datetime.fromisoformat(valid_until.replace('Z', '+00:00'))
                if expires < datetime.now(expires.tzinfo):
                    return {"valid": False, "message": "Discount code has expired"}
            
            # Check total uses
            if code_data.get("used_count", 0) >= code_data.get("max_uses", 0):
                return {"valid": False, "message": "Discount code usage limit reached"}
            
            # Check per-user limit
            if user_id:
                user_uses = self.supabase.table("discount_code_usage").select("count").eq("code_id", code_data["id"]).eq("user_id", user_id).execute()
                user_use_count = len(user_uses.data) if user_uses.data else 0
                
                if user_use_count >= code_data.get("max_uses_per_user", 1):
                    return {"valid": False, "message": "You have reached the usage limit for this code"}
            
            return {
                "valid": True,
                "code": code,
                "discount_type": code_data.get("discount_type"),
                "discount_value": code_data.get("discount_value"),
                "remaining_uses": code_data.get("max_uses", 0) - code_data.get("used_count", 0),
                "message": f"Valid! {code_data.get('discount_value')}% off your purchase"
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error validating discount code: {e}")
            return {"valid": False, "message": "Error validating code"}
    
    async def apply_discount_code(self, code: str, user_id: str, order_id: str, order_total: float) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Apply discount code to an order"""
        try:
            # Validate code
            validation = await self.validate_discount_code(code, user_id)
            
            if not validation.get("valid"):
                return validation
            
            # Get code ID
            code_result = self.supabase.table("discount_codes").select("id, discount_value, discount_type").eq("code", code).single().execute()
            code_id = code_result.data["id"]
            
            # Calculate discount
            discount_value = code_result.data["discount_value"]
            discount_type = code_result.data["discount_type"]
            
            if discount_type == "percentage":
                discount_amount = order_total * (discount_value / 100)
            else:
                discount_amount = min(discount_value, order_total)
            
            final_total = order_total - discount_amount
            
            # Record usage
            usage_data = {
                "code_id": code_id,
                "user_id": user_id,
                "order_id": order_id,
                "discount_amount": round(discount_amount, 2)
            }
            
            self.supabase.table("discount_code_usage").insert(usage_data).execute()
            
            # Update code usage count
            self.supabase.rpc("increment_discount_usage", {"code_id": code_id}).execute()
            
            return {
                "success": True,
                "code": code,
                "discount_amount": round(discount_amount, 2),
                "final_total": round(final_total, 2),
                "message": f"Discount applied! You saved ${discount_amount:.2f}"
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error applying discount: {e}")
            return {"success": False, "message": str(e)}
    
    async def get_user_discount_codes(self, user_id: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get all discount codes for a user based on their linked wallet"""
        try:
            # Get user's wallet
            user_result = self.supabase.table("users").select("wallet_address").eq("id", user_id).single().execute()
            
            if not user_result.data or not user_result.data.get("wallet_address"):
                return []
            
            wallet_address = user_result.data["wallet_address"]
            
            # Get eligible wallet
            wallet_result = self.supabase.table("airdrop_eligible_wallets").select("id").eq("wallet_address", wallet_address).single().execute()
            
            if not wallet_result.data:
                return []
            
            wallet_id = wallet_result.data["id"]
            
            # Get discount codes
            codes_result = self.supabase.table("discount_codes").select("*").eq("eligible_wallet_id", wallet_id).eq("is_active", True).execute()
            
            codes = codes_result.data or []
            
            # Calculate remaining uses for each
            for code in codes:
                code["remaining_uses"] = code.get("max_uses", 0) - code.get("used_count", 0)
            
            return codes
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting user discount codes: {e}")
            return []


# Fix missing import
from datetime import timedelta

# Singleton
airdrop_service = AirdropService()

        try:

            if not result.data:
                return {"valid": False, "message": "Invalid discount code"}

            valid_until = code_data.get("valid_until")

                "discount_value": code_data.get("discount_value"),

            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error validating discount code: {e}")
            return {"valid": False, "message": "Error validating code"}

        """Apply discount code to an order"""

{"path": "/root/rmi/backend/services/forum_service.py", "content": """"
Forum / Snitch Board Service
============================
Reddit-style forum for scam reporting and crypto discussions
"""
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional
import logging
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi')
from setup_supabase import supabase

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class ForumService:
    """Service for managing forum posts, comments, and interactions"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.supabase = supabase
        
    # ==========================================
    # CATEGORIES
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_categories(self, include_private: bool = False) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get all forum categories"""
        try:
            query = self.supabase.table("forum_categories").select("*")
            
            if not include_private:
                query = query.eq("is_private", False)
            
            result = query.order("name").execute()
            return result.data or []
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting categories: {e}")
            return []
    
    async def get_category_by_slug(self, slug: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get category by slug"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("forum_categories").select("*").eq("slug", slug).single().execute()
            return result.data
        except Exception as e:
            return None
    
    # ==========================================
    # POSTS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_posts(
        self,
        category_id: str = None,
        sort_by: str = "hot",  # hot, new, top
        page: int = 1,
        per_page: int = 20,
        include_deleted: bool = False
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get posts with pagination and sorting"""
        try:
            query = self.supabase.table("forum_posts").select("*, author:users(id, username, display_name, avatar_url)").eq("is_deleted", False)
            
            if category_id:
                query = query.eq("category_id", category_id)
            
            # Apply sorting
            if sort_by == "new":
                query = query.order("created_at", desc=True)
            elif sort_by == "top":
                query = query.order("upvotes", desc=True)
            else:  # hot - combination of recency and engagement
                query = query.order("last_activity_at", desc=True)
            
            # Pagination
            offset = (page - 1) * per_page
            query = query.range(offset, offset + per_page - 1)
            
            result = query.execute()
            
            # Get total count
            count_result = self.supabase.table("forum_posts").select("count").eq("is_deleted", False)
            if category_id:
                count_result = count_result.eq("category_id", category_id)
            count_data = count_result.execute()
            total = count_data.data[0]["count"] if count_data.data else 0
            
            return {
                "posts": result.data or [],
                "total": total,
                "page": page,
                "per_page": per_page,
                "total_pages": (total + per_page - 1) // per_page
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting posts: {e}")
            return {"posts": [], "total": 0, "page": page, "per_page": per_page, "total_pages": 0}
    
    async def get_post(self, post_id: str, increment_views: bool = True) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get single post by ID"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("forum_posts").select("*, author:users(id, username, display_name, avatar_url)").eq("id", post_id).single().execute()
            
            if not result.data:
                return None
            
            post = result.data
            
            # Increment view count
            if increment_views:
                self.supabase.table("forum_posts").update({"view_count": post.get("view_count", 0) + 1}).eq("id", post_id).execute()
                post["view_count"] = post.get("view_count", 0) + 1
            
            # Get comments
            comments = await self.get_comments(post_id)
            post["comments_list"] = comments
            
            return post
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting post: {e}")
            return None
    
    async def create_post(
        self,
        category_id: str,
        author_id: str,
        title: str,
        content: str,
        is_anonymous: bool = False,
        is_scam_report: bool = False,
        scam_details: Dict[str, Any] = None,
        images: List[str] = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Create new forum post"""
        try:
            post_data = {
                "category_id": category_id,
                "author_id": None if is_anonymous else author_id,
                "title": title,
                "content": content,
                "is_anonymous": is_anonymous,
                "is_scam_report": is_scam_report,
                "images": images or []
            }
            
            # Add scam report details if applicable
            if is_scam_report and scam_details:
                post_data.update({
                    "reported_wallet_addresses": scam_details.get("wallet_addresses", []),
                    "reported_token_address": scam_details.get("token_address"),
                    "scam_type": scam_details.get("scam_type"),
                    "evidence_links": scam_details.get("evidence_links", [])
                })
            
            result = self.supabase.table("forum_posts").insert(post_data).execute()
            
            if result.data:
                # Update category post count
                self.supabase.rpc("increment_category_post_count", {"cat_id": category_id}).execute()
                
                return {"success": True, "post": result.data[0]}
            else:
                return {"success": False, "message": "Failed to create post"}
                
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error creating post: {e}")
            return {"success": False, "message": str(e)}
    
    async def update_post(self, post_id: str, author_id: str, update_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
        """Update post (only author can update)"""
        try:
            # Check ownership
            post = self.supabase.table("forum_posts").select("author_id").eq("id", post_id).single().execute()
            
            if not post.data or post.data.get("author_id") != author_id:
                return False
            
            update_data["updated_at"] = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            self.supabase.table("forum_posts").update(update_data).eq("id", post_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error updating post: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def delete_post(self, post_id: str, user_id: str, is_admin: bool = False) -> bool:
        """Soft delete post"""
        try:
            # Check ownership or admin
            if not is_admin:
                post = self.supabase.table("forum_posts").select("author_id").eq("id", post_id).single().execute()
                if not post.data or post.data.get("author_id") != user_id:
                    return False
            
            self.supabase.table("forum_posts").update({"is_deleted": True}).eq("id", post_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error deleting post: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # COMMENTS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_comments(self, post_id: str, parent_comment_id: str = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get comments for a post"""
        try:
            query = self.supabase.table("forum_comments").select("*, author:users(id, username, display_name, avatar_url)").eq("post_id", post_id).eq("is_deleted", False)
            
            if parent_comment_id:
                query = query.eq("parent_comment_id", parent_comment_id)
            else:
                query = query.is_("parent_comment_id", "null")
            
            result = query.order("created_at", desc=True).execute()
            comments = result.data or []
            
            # Recursively get replies
            for comment in comments:
                replies = await self.get_comments(post_id, comment["id"])
                comment["replies"] = replies
            
            return comments
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting comments: {e}")
            return []
    
    async def create_comment(
        self,
        post_id: str,
        author_id: str,
        content: str,
        parent_comment_id: str = None,
        is_anonymous: bool = False
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Create new comment"""
        try:
            comment_data = {
                "post_id": post_id,
                "author_id": None if is_anonymous else author_id,
                "content": content,
                "parent_comment_id": parent_comment_id,
                "is_anonymous": is_anonymous
            }
            
            result = self.supabase.table("forum_comments").insert(comment_data).execute()
            
            if result.data:

                self.supabase.table("forum_posts").update({
                    "last_activity_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
                }).eq("id", post_id).execute()
                
                return {"success": True, "comment": result.data[0]}
            else:
