            return {"success": False, "message": str(e)}
    
    # ==========================================
    # VOTING
    # ==========================================
    
    async def vote_post(self, post_id: str, user_id: str, vote_type: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Vote on a post (upvote or downvote)"""
        try:
            # Check if already voted
            existing = self.supabase.table("forum_votes").select("*").eq("post_id", post_id).eq("user_id", user_id).execute()
            
            if existing.data:
                # Update existing vote
                current_vote = existing.data[0]
                if current_vote["vote_type"] == vote_type:
                    # Remove vote (toggle off)
                    self.supabase.table("forum_votes").delete().eq("id", current_vote["id"]).execute()
                    
                    # Update post counts
                    if vote_type == "up":
                        self.supabase.rpc("decrement_post_upvotes", {"post_id": post_id}).execute()
                    else:
                        self.supabase.rpc("decrement_post_downvotes", {"post_id": post_id}).execute()
                    
                    return {"success": True, "action": "removed", "vote_type": vote_type}
                else:
                    # Change vote
                    self.supabase.table("forum_votes").update({"vote_type": vote_type}).eq("id", current_vote["id"]).execute()
                    
                    # Update post counts
                    if vote_type == "up":
                        self.supabase.rpc("swap_vote_to_up", {"post_id": post_id}).execute()
                    else:
                        self.supabase.rpc("swap_vote_to_down", {"post_id": post_id}).execute()
                    
                    return {"success": True, "action": "changed", "vote_type": vote_type}
            else:
                # Create new vote
                vote_data = {
                    "post_id": post_id,
                    "user_id": user_id,
                    "vote_type": vote_type
                }
                self.supabase.table("forum_votes").insert(vote_data).execute()
                
                # Update post counts
                if vote_type == "up":
                    self.supabase.rpc("increment_post_upvotes", {"post_id": post_id}).execute()
                else:
                    self.supabase.rpc("increment_post_downvotes", {"post_id": post_id}).execute()
                
                return {"success": True, "action": "added", "vote_type": vote_type}
                
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error voting on post: {e}")
            return {"success": False, "message": str(e)}
    
    # ==========================================
    # SCAM REPORTING
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_scam_reports(
        self,
        scam_type: str = None,
        status: str = None,
        page: int = 1,
        per_page: int = 20
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get scam reports with filters"""
        try:
            query = self.supabase.table("forum_posts").select("*, author:users(id, username, display_name, avatar_url), category:forum_categories(name, slug)").eq("is_scam_report", True).eq("is_deleted", False)
            
            if scam_type:
                query = query.eq("scam_type", scam_type)
            if status:
                query = query.eq("scam_status", status)
            
            # Get scam category
            scam_category = self.supabase.table("forum_categories").select("id").eq("slug", "scam-reports").single().execute()
            if scam_category.data:
                query = query.eq("category_id", scam_category.data["id"])
            
            offset = (page - 1) * per_page
            result = query.order("created_at", desc=True).range(offset, offset + per_page - 1).execute()
            
            return {
                "reports": result.data or [],
                "page": page,
                "per_page": per_page
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting scam reports: {e}")
            return {"reports": [], "page": page, "per_page": per_page}
    
    async def update_scam_status(self, post_id: str, status: str, updated_by: str) -> bool:
        """Update scam report status (admin/moderator only)"""
        try:
            valid_statuses = ["reported", "under_review", "verified", "false_positive", "resolved"]
            if status not in valid_statuses:
                return False
            
            self.supabase.table("forum_posts").update({
                "scam_status": status,
                "updated_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            }).eq("id", post_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error updating scam status: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # SUBSCRIPTIONS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def subscribe_to_category(self, user_id: str, category_id: str) -> bool:
        """Subscribe user to category"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("forum_subscriptions").insert({
                "user_id": user_id,
                "category_id": category_id
            }).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error subscribing: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def unsubscribe_from_category(self, user_id: str, category_id: str) -> bool:
        """Unsubscribe user from category"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("forum_subscriptions").delete().eq("user_id", user_id).eq("category_id", category_id).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error unsubscribing: {e}")
            return False

forum_service = ForumService()

                query = query.eq("is_private", False)
            
            result = query.order("name").execute()
            return result.data or []

            logger.error(f"Error getting categories: {e}")
            return []

            return result.data

                query = query.eq("category_id", category_id)

                query = query.order("created_at", desc=True)

            else:  # hot - combination of recency and engagement

            # Pagination

            query = query.range(offset, offset + per_page - 1)
            
            result = query.execute()
            
            # Get total count

            if category_id:
                count_result = count_result.eq("category_id", category_id)
            count_data = count_result.execute()
            total = count_data.data[0]["count"] if count_data.data else 0
            
            return {

            }

    async def vote_post(self, post_id: str, user_id: str, vote_type: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:

            }).eq("id", post_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error updating scam status: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # SUBSCRIPTIONS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def subscribe_to_category(self, user_id: str, category_id: str) -> bool:
        """Subscribe user to category"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("forum_subscriptions").insert({
                "user_id": user_id,
                "category_id": category_id
            }).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error subscribing: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def unsubscribe_from_category(self, user_id: str, category_id: str) -> bool:
        """Unsubscribe user from category"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("forum_subscriptions").delete().eq("user_id", user_id).eq("category_id", category_id).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error unsubscribing: {e}")
            return False


# Singleton

{"path": "/root/rmi/backend/services/education_service.py", "content": """"
Education Library Service
=========================
Crypto education content management and user progress tracking
"""
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional
import logging
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi')
from setup_supabase import supabase

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class EducationService:
    """Service for managing educational content and user progress"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.supabase = supabase
        
    # ==========================================
    # CATEGORIES
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_categories(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get all education categories"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_categories").select("*").order("sort_order").execute()
            return result.data or []
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting categories: {e}")
            return []
    
    async def get_category_by_slug(self, slug: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get category by slug"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_categories").select("*").eq("slug", slug).single().execute()
            return result.data
        except Exception as e:
            return None
    
    # ==========================================
    # CONTENT
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_content(
        self,
        category_id: str = None,
        difficulty: str = None,
        is_premium: bool = None,
        search_query: str = None,
        page: int = 1,
        per_page: int = 20
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get educational content with filters"""
        try:
            query = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("*, category:education_categories(name, slug, color)").eq("is_published", True)
            
            if category_id:
                query = query.eq("category_id", category_id)
            if difficulty:
                query = query.eq("difficulty", difficulty)
            if is_premium is not None:
                query = query.eq("is_premium", is_premium)
            if search_query:
                # Full-text search on title and description
                query = query.or_(f"title.ilike.%{search_query}%,description.ilike.%{search_query}%")
            
            # Order by featured first, then by published date
            query = query.order("is_featured", desc=True).order("published_at", desc=True)
            
            # Pagination
            offset = (page - 1) * per_page
            query = query.range(offset, offset + per_page - 1)
            
            result = query.execute()
            
            # Get total count
            count_query = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("count").eq("is_published", True)
            if category_id:
                count_query = count_query.eq("category_id", category_id)
            count_data = count_query.execute()
            total = count_data.data[0]["count"] if count_data.data else 0
            
            return {
                "content": result.data or [],
                "total": total,
                "page": page,
                "per_page": per_page,
                "total_pages": (total + per_page - 1) // per_page
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting content: {e}")
            return {"content": [], "total": 0, "page": page, "per_page": per_page, "total_pages": 0}
    
    async def get_content_by_slug(self, slug: str, user_id: str = None) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get single content by slug"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("*, category:education_categories(name, slug, color)").eq("slug", slug).single().execute()
            
            if not result.data:
                return None
            
            content = result.data
            
            # Increment view count
            self.supabase.table("education_content").update({
                "view_count": content.get("view_count", 0) + 1
            }).eq("id", content["id"]).execute()
            content["view_count"] = content.get("view_count", 0) + 1
            
            # Get user progress if user_id provided
            if user_id:
                progress = await self.get_user_progress(user_id, content["id"])
                content["user_progress"] = progress
            
            return content
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting content: {e}")
            return None
    
    async def get_featured_content(self, limit: int = 5) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get featured content"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("*, category:education_categories(name, slug)").eq("is_published", True).eq("is_featured", True).order("published_at", desc=True).limit(limit).execute()
            return result.data or []
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting featured content: {e}")
            return []
    
    # ==========================================
    # USER PROGRESS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_user_progress(self, user_id: str, content_id: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get user's progress for specific content"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_progress").select("*").eq("user_id", user_id).eq("content_id", content_id).single().execute()
            return result.data
        except Exception as e:
            return None
    
    async def update_progress(
        self,
        user_id: str,
        content_id: str,
        progress_percent: int = None,
        time_spent_seconds: int = None,
        last_position: str = None,
        mark_complete: bool = False
    ) -> bool:
        """Update user's learning progress"""
        try:
            # Check if progress exists
            existing = await self.get_user_progress(user_id, content_id)
            
            update_data = {
                "last_accessed_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            }
            
            if progress_percent is not None:
                update_data["progress_percent"] = min(progress_percent, 100)
            if time_spent_seconds is not None:
                update_data["time_spent_seconds"] = time_spent_seconds
            if last_position is not None:
                update_data["last_position"] = last_position
            if mark_complete:
                update_data["is_completed"] = True
                update_data["completed_at"] = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
                update_data["progress_percent"] = 100
            
            if existing:
                # Update existing
                self.supabase.table("education_progress").update(update_data).eq("id", existing["id"]).execute()
            else:
                # Create new
                update_data["user_id"] = user_id
                update_data["content_id"] = content_id
                self.supabase.table("education_progress").insert(update_data).execute()
            
            # If completed, increment content completion count
            if mark_complete:
                content = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("completion_count").eq("id", content_id).single().execute()
                if content.data:
                    self.supabase.table("education_content").update({
                        "completion_count": content.data["completion_count"] + 1
                    }).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            
            return True
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error updating progress: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def get_user_learning_stats(self, user_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get user's overall learning statistics"""
        try:
            # Get all progress
            result = self.supabase.table("education_progress").select("*").eq("user_id", user_id).execute()
            progress_list = result.data or []
            
            total_content = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("count").eq("is_published", True).execute()
            total_published = total_content.data[0]["count"] if total_content.data else 0
            
            completed = len([p for p in progress_list if p.get("is_completed")])
            in_progress = len([p for p in progress_list if not p.get("is_completed") and p.get("progress_percent", 0) > 0])
            
            total_time = sum(p.get("time_spent_seconds", 0) for p in progress_list)
            
            return {
                "total_content_available": total_published,
                "completed_courses": completed,
                "in_progress_courses": in_progress,
                "not_started": total_published - completed - in_progress,
                "completion_percentage": round((completed / total_published * 100), 2) if total_published > 0 else 0,
                "total_time_spent_minutes": total_time // 60,
                "total_time_spent_hours": round(total_time / 3600, 2)
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting learning stats: {e}")
            return {}
    
    async def get_user_completed_courses(self, user_id: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get all courses completed by user"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_progress").select("*, content:education_content(*)").eq("user_id", user_id).eq("is_completed", True).execute()
            return result.data or []
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting completed courses: {e}")
            return []
    
    # ==========================================
    # BOOKMARKS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def bookmark_content(self, user_id: str, content_id: str, notes: str = None) -> bool:
        """Bookmark content for later"""
        try:
            bookmark_data = {
                "user_id": user_id,
                "content_id": content_id,
                "notes": notes
            }
            
            self.supabase.table("education_bookmarks").insert(bookmark_data).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error bookmarking content: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def remove_bookmark(self, user_id: str, content_id: str) -> bool:
        """Remove bookmark"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("education_bookmarks").delete().eq("user_id", user_id).eq("content_id", content_id).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error removing bookmark: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def get_user_bookmarks(self, user_id: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get all user bookmarks"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_bookmarks").select("*, content:education_content(*)").eq("user_id", user_id).execute()
            return result.data or []
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting bookmarks: {e}")
            return []
    
    # ==========================================
    # LIKES
    # ==========================================
    
    async def like_content(self, user_id: str, content_id: str) -> bool:
        """Like educational content"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("education_likes").insert({
                "user_id": user_id,
                "content_id": content_id
            }).execute()
            
            # Increment like count
            content = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("like_count").eq("id", content_id).single().execute()
            if content.data:
                self.supabase.table("education_content").update({
                    "like_count": content.data["like_count"] + 1
                }).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error liking content: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def unlike_content(self, user_id: str, content_id: str) -> bool:
        """Remove like from content"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("education_likes").delete().eq("user_id", user_id).eq("content_id", content_id).execute()
            
            # Decrement like count
            content = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("like_count").eq("id", content_id).single().execute()
            if content.data and content.data["like_count"] > 0:
                self.supabase.table("education_content").update({
                    "like_count": content.data["like_count"] - 1
                }).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error unliking content: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # CONTENT MANAGEMENT (ADMIN)
    # ==========================================
    
    async def create_content(self, content_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Create new educational content (admin only)"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_content").insert(content_data).execute()
            
            if result.data:
                # Update category count
                if content_data.get("category_id"):
                    self.supabase.rpc("increment_education_category_count", {
                        "cat_id": content_data["category_id"]
                    }).execute()
                
                return {"success": True, "content": result.data[0]}
            else:
                return {"success": False, "message": "Failed to create content"}
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error creating content: {e}")
            return {"success": False, "message": str(e)}
    
    async def update_content(self, content_id: str, update_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
        """Update educational content (admin only)"""
        try:
            update_data["updated_at"] = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            self.supabase.table("education_content").update(update_data).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error updating content: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def delete_content(self, content_id: str) -> bool:
        """Soft delete content (admin only)"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("education_content").update({
                "is_published": False,
                "updated_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            }).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error deleting content: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # RECOMMENDATIONS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_recommendations(self, user_id: str, limit: int = 5) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get personalized content recommendations"""
        try:
            # Get user's completed content categories
            completed = self.supabase.table("education_progress").select("content(category_id)").eq("user_id", user_id).eq("is_completed", True).execute()
            completed_categories = [c["content"]["category_id"] for c in completed.data if c.get("content")]
            
            # Get content from similar categories
            if completed_categories:
                result = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("*").in_("category_id", completed_categories).eq("is_published", True).neq("id", [c["content_id"] for c in completed.data]).order("view_count", desc=True).limit(limit).execute()
                return result.data or []
            else:
                # Return popular content for new users
                result = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("*").eq("is_published", True).order("view_count", desc=True).limit(limit).execute()
                return result.data or []
                
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting recommendations: {e}")
            return []


# Singleton
education_service = EducationService()

            self.supabase.table("education_likes").insert({
                "user_id": user_id,
                "content_id": content_id
            }).execute()
            
            # Increment like count
            content = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("like_count").eq("id", content_id).single().execute()
            if content.data:
                self.supabase.table("education_content").update({
                    "like_count": content.data["like_count"] + 1
                }).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error liking content: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def unlike_content(self, user_id: str, content_id: str) -> bool:
        """Remove like from content"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("education_likes").delete().eq("user_id", user_id).eq("content_id", content_id).execute()
            
            # Decrement like count
            content = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("like_count").eq("id", content_id).single().execute()
            if content.data and content.data["like_count"] > 0:
                self.supabase.table("education_content").update({
                    "like_count": content.data["like_count"] - 1
                }).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error unliking content: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # CONTENT MANAGEMENT (ADMIN)
    # ==========================================
    
    async def create_content(self, content_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Create new educational content (admin only)"""
        try:
            result = self.supabase.table("education_content").insert(content_data).execute()
            
            if result.data:
                # Update category count
                if content_data.get("category_id"):
                    self.supabase.rpc("increment_education_category_count", {
                        "cat_id": content_data["category_id"]
                    }).execute()
                
                return {"success": True, "content": result.data[0]}
            else:
                return {"success": False, "message": "Failed to create content"}
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error creating content: {e}")
            return {"success": False, "message": str(e)}
    
    async def update_content(self, content_id: str, update_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
        """Update educational content (admin only)"""
        try:
            update_data["updated_at"] = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            self.supabase.table("education_content").update(update_data).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error updating content: {e}")
            return False
    
    async def delete_content(self, content_id: str) -> bool:
        """Soft delete content (admin only)"""
        try:
            self.supabase.table("education_content").update({
                "is_published": False,
                "updated_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            }).eq("id", content_id).execute()
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error deleting content: {e}")
            return False
    
    # ==========================================
    # RECOMMENDATIONS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_recommendations(self, user_id: str, limit: int = 5) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get personalized content recommendations"""
        try:
            # Get user's completed content categories
            completed = self.supabase.table("education_progress").select("content(category_id)").eq("user_id", user_id).eq("is_completed", True).execute()
            completed_categories = [c["content"]["category_id"] for c in completed.data if c.get("content")]
            
            # Get content from similar categories
            if completed_categories:
                result = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("*").in_("category_id", completed_categories).eq("is_published", True).neq("id", [c["content_id"] for c in completed.data]).order("view_count", desc=True).limit(limit).execute()
                return result.data or []
            else:
                # Return popular content for new users
                result = self.supabase.table("education_content").select("*").eq("is_published", True).order("view_count", desc=True).limit(limit).execute()
                return result.data or []
                
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting recommendations: {e}")
            return []

education_service = EducationService()

AI Router Configuration - The Brain of the Operation
====================================================
Free-tier maximization with intelligent fallback chains.
"""
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Callable
from enum import Enum

class TaskType(Enum):
    """Types of tasks the AI system handles"""
    SCAM_DETECTION = "scam_detection"
    CONTENT_MODERATION = "content_moderation"
    TECHNICAL_ANALYSIS = "technical_analysis"
    CODE_REVIEW = "code_review"
    SUMMARIZATION = "summarization"
    CLASSIFICATION = "classification"
    EMBEDDINGS = "embeddings"
    IMAGE_ANALYSIS = "image_analysis"
    CHAT = "chat"
    TWITTER_SCRAPING = "twitter_scraping"
    WALLET_ANALYSIS = "wallet_analysis"
    REPORT_GENERATION = "report_generation"
    TRANSLATION = "translation"
    SENTIMENT_ANALYSIS = "sentiment_analysis"

class Priority(Enum):
    """Priority levels for API selection"""
    FREE_ONLY = 1
    FREE_PREFERRED = 2
    BALANCED = 3
    QUALITY_PREFERRED = 4
    PAID_ONLY = 5

@dataclass
class ModelConfig:
    """Configuration for each AI model/provider"""
    name: str

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Callable
from enum import Enum

class TaskType(Enum):
    """Types of tasks the AI system handles"""
    SCAM_DETECTION = "scam_detection"
    CONTENT_MODERATION = "content_moderation"
    TECHNICAL_ANALYSIS = "technical_analysis"
    CODE_REVIEW = "code_review"
    SUMMARIZATION = "summarization"
    CLASSIFICATION = "classification"
    EMBEDDINGS = "embeddings"
    IMAGE_ANALYSIS = "image_analysis"

    WALLET_ANALYSIS = "wallet_analysis"
    REPORT_GENERATION = "report_generation"
    TRANSLATION = "translation"
    SENTIMENT_ANALYSIS = "sentiment_analysis"

class Priority(Enum):
    """Priority levels for API selection"""
    FREE_ONLY = 1
    FREE_PREFERRED = 2
    BALANCED = 3
    QUALITY_PREFERRED = 4
    PAID_ONLY = 5

        "max_cost_per_request": 0.01,  # $0.01 per request
        "fallback_to_paid": True,

    },
    "emergency": {
        "description": "Use any available, cost no concern",
        "max_cost_per_request": float('inf'),
        "fallback_to_paid": True,
        "priority": Priority.PAID_ONLY
    }
}

# ============================================================
# SECURITY & ROTATION SETTINGS
# ============================================================

SECURITY_CONFIG = {
    # Password rotation for API keys
    "key_rotation_interval_days": 30,
    "emergency_rotation_on_error_count": 5,
    
    # VPN requirements
    "vpn_required_providers": ["twitter_scraper", "apify", "perplexity"],
    "vpn_check_endpoint": "https://ipinfo.io",
    
    # Email settings (moving from Gmail)
    "primary_email_domain": "rugmunch.io",  # Your .com domain
    "email_rotation_aliases": True,
    "max_emails_per_provider": 3,
    
    # Rate limiting protection
    "circuit_breaker_threshold": 5,  # errors before switching
    "circuit_breaker_timeout_seconds": 300,  # 5 minutes
    
    # Anti-hallucination
    "max_chain_length": 3,  # Prevent loops
    "require_grounding": True,  # Models must cite sources
    "cross_validation_threshold": 0.7,  # 70% agreement needed
    
    # Data collection
    "twitter_scrape_interval_minutes": 15,
    "wallet_monitor_interval_minutes": 5,
    "max_data_retention_days": 90,
}

# ============================================================
# FREE CREDIT TRACKING
# ============================================================

FREE_CREDITS_TRACKING = {
    "gemini_accounts": {
        "account_1": {"credits": 2000.0, "expiry": "2026-12-31", "usage": 0.0},
        "account_2": {"credits": 450.0, "expiry": "2026-12-31", "usage": 0.0},
        "account_3": {"credits": 450.0, "expiry": "2026-12-31", "usage": 0.0},

}

# Calculate total runway
total_free_credits = sum(

{"path": "/root/rmi/backend/services/ai_router_service.py", "content": """"
AI Router Service - Intelligent Multi-Provider Routing
======================================================
Maximizes free tiers, tracks costs, prevents overages.
"""
import asyncio
import time
import json
import logging
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any, Tuple
from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from enum import Enum
import httpx
import hashlib
from collections import defaultdict
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi')
from setup_supabase import supabase

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi/backend')
from config.ai_router_config import (
    AI_PROVIDERS, TASK_MODEL_MAPPING, COST_STRATEGIES,
    TaskType, Priority, ModelConfig
)
from config.settings import settings

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


@dataclass
class UsageStats:
    """Tracks usage for a provider"""
    provider: str
    requests_today: int = 0
    tokens_in_today: int = 0
    tokens_out_today: int = 0
    cost_today: float = 0.0
    requests_total: int = 0
    cost_total: float = 0.0
    last_used: Optional[datetime] = None
    error_count: int = 0
    last_error: Optional[str] = None
    circuit_open: bool = False
    circuit_open_until: Optional[datetime] = None


@dataclass
class RoutingDecision:
    """Result of routing decision"""
    provider: str
    model: str
    estimated_cost: float
    reason: str
    fallback_chain: List[str]
    confidence: float


class AIRouterService:
    """
    Intelligent AI API Router
    Routes requests to cheapest/best provider based on task, cost, availability
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.supabase = supabase
        self.usage_stats: Dict[str, UsageStats] = {}
        self.request_queue: asyncio.Queue = asyncio.Queue()
        self.is_running = False
        self._initialize_providers()
        
    def _initialize_providers(self):
        """Initialize usage tracking for all providers"""
        for provider_id, config in AI_PROVIDERS.items():
            self.usage_stats[provider_id] = UsageStats(provider=provider_id)
        
        # Load historical stats from DB
        self._load_usage_stats()
    
    def _load_usage_stats(self):
        """Load usage stats from database"""
        try:
            today = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
            result = self.supabase.table("ai_provider_usage").select("*").eq("date", today).execute()
            
            for row in result.data or []:
                provider = row.get("provider")
                if provider in self.usage_stats:
                    self.usage_stats[provider].requests_today = row.get("requests", 0)
                    self.usage_stats[provider].cost_today = row.get("cost", 0.0)
                    self.usage_stats[provider].tokens_in_today = row.get("tokens_in", 0)
                    self.usage_stats[provider].tokens_out_today = row.get("tokens_out", 0)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error loading usage stats: {e}")
    
    async def _save_usage_stats(self):
        """Save usage stats to database"""
        try:
            today = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
            
            for provider_id, stats in self.usage_stats.items():
                data = {
                    "provider": provider_id,
                    "date": today,
                    "requests": stats.requests_today,
                    "cost": stats.cost_today,
                    "tokens_in": stats.tokens_in_today,
                    "tokens_out": stats.tokens_out_today,
                    "updated_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
                }
                
                # Upsert
                self.supabase.table("ai_provider_usage").upsert(data).execute()
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error saving usage stats: {e}")
    
    # ==========================================
    # ROUTING LOGIC
    # ==========================================
    
    async def route_request(
        self,
        task_type: TaskType,
        prompt: str,
        priority: Priority = Priority.FREE_PREFERRED,
        required_quality: float = None,
        max_cost: float = None,
        timeout_ms: int = 30000
    ) -> RoutingDecision:
        """
        Determine best provider for a request
        
        Algorithm:
        1. Get candidates for task type
        2. Filter by availability (circuit breaker, rate limits)
        3. Sort by cost (free first, then cheapest)
        4. Filter by quality if specified
        5. Return best match with fallback chain
        """
        
        # Get task mapping
        task_mapping = TASK_MODEL_MAPPING.get(task_type, {
            "primary": ["gemini_primary", "openrouter_free"],
            "backup": ["groq", "fireworks"],
            "min_quality": 6.0,
            "priority": Priority.FREE_PREFERRED
        })
        
        # Combine primary and backup
        all_candidates = task_mapping["primary"] + task_mapping["backup"]
        
        # Filter and score candidates
        scored_candidates = []
        
        for provider_id in all_candidates:
            if provider_id not in AI_PROVIDERS:
                continue
            
            config = AI_PROVIDERS[provider_id]
            stats = self.usage_stats[provider_id]
            
            # Check circuit breaker
            if stats.circuit_open:
                if stats.circuit_open_until and datetime.now() > stats.circuit_open_until:
                    stats.circuit_open = False
                else:
                    continue
            
            # Check if provider is available (has credits or free)
            if not config.is_free_tier and stats.cost_today >= config.current_credits:
                continue
            
            # Check free tier limits
            if config.free_tier_limit and stats.requests_today >= config.free_tier_limit:
                continue
            
            # Check rate limits
            if stats.last_used:
                time_since_last = (datetime.now() - stats.last_used).total_seconds()
                min_interval = 60 / config.rate_limit_rpm
                if time_since_last < min_interval:
                    continue
            
            # Calculate score (lower is better)
            cost_score = config.cost_per_1k_tokens if not config.is_free_tier else 0
            quality_score = 10 - config.quality_score  # Invert (lower better)
            reliability_penalty = 0 if config.reliability_score > 7 else 2
            
            # Penalize if errors recently
            error_penalty = stats.error_count * 0.5
            
            total_score = cost_score + quality_score + reliability_penalty + error_penalty
            
            scored_candidates.append((provider_id, total_score, config))
        
        # Sort by score
        scored_candidates.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
        
        if not scored_candidates:
            # Emergency fallback - use any available
            return RoutingDecision(
                provider="gemini_primary",
                model="gemini-pro",
                estimated_cost=0.0,
                reason="Emergency fallback - no optimal providers available",
                fallback_chain=[],
                confidence=0.5
            )
        
        # Select best
        best_provider_id, best_score, best_config = scored_candidates[0]
        
        # Build fallback chain (next 3 best)
        fallback_chain = [c[0] for c in scored_candidates[1:4]]
        
        # Calculate estimated cost
        estimated_tokens = len(prompt.split()) * 1.5  # Rough estimate
        estimated_cost = (estimated_tokens / 1000) * best_config.cost_per_1k_tokens
        
        return RoutingDecision(
            provider=best_provider_id,
            model=best_config.name,
            estimated_cost=estimated_cost,
            reason=f"Selected based on cost={best_config.cost_per_1k_tokens}, quality={best_config.quality_score}, reliability={best_config.reliability_score}",
            fallback_chain=fallback_chain,
            confidence=0.9 if best_config.reliability_score > 8 else 0.7
        )
    
    # ==========================================
    # REQUEST EXECUTION
    # ==========================================
    
    async def execute_request(
        self,
        provider_id: str,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int = 1000,
        temperature: float = 0.7,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Execute request to specific provider"""
        
        if provider_id not in AI_PROVIDERS:
            raise ValueError(f"Unknown provider: {provider_id}")
        
        config = AI_PROVIDERS[provider_id]
        stats = self.usage_stats[provider_id]
        
        start_time = time.time()
        
        try:
            # Route to appropriate handler
            if config.provider == "google":
                response = await self._call_gemini(provider_id, prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "groq":
                response = await self._call_groq(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "fireworks":
                response = await self._call_fireworks(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "openrouter":
                response = await self._call_openrouter(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "nvidia":
                response = await self._call_nvidia(prompt, max_tokens, temperature)
            elif config.provider == "mistral":
                response = await self._call_mistral(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "together":
                response = await self._call_together(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "cohere":
                response = await self._call_cohere(prompt, max_tokens, temperature)
            elif config.provider == "perplexity":
                response = await self._call_perplexity(prompt, max_tokens, temperature)
            elif config.provider == "deepseek":
                response = await self._call_deepseek(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            else:
                raise ValueError(f"Unknown provider type: {config.provider}")
            
            # Update stats
            elapsed = time.time() - start_time
            tokens_used = response.get("tokens_used", len(prompt.split()) + max_tokens)
            cost = (tokens_used / 1000) * config.cost_per_1k_tokens
            
            stats.requests_today += 1
            stats.requests_total += 1
            stats.cost_today += cost
            stats.cost_total += cost
            stats.tokens_out_today += tokens_used
            stats.last_used = datetime.now()
            stats.error_count = 0
            
            # Save stats periodically
            if stats.requests_today % 10 == 0:
                await self._save_usage_stats()
            
            return {
                "success": True,
                "provider": provider_id,
                "response": response.get("text", ""),
                "tokens_used": tokens_used,
                "cost": cost,
                "latency_ms": elapsed * 1000,
                "model": response.get("model", config.name)
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            # Update error stats
            stats.error_count += 1
            stats.last_error = str(e)
            
            # Circuit breaker logic
            if stats.error_count >= 5:
                stats.circuit_open = True
                stats.circuit_open_until = datetime.now() + timedelta(minutes=5)
                logger.warning(f"Circuit opened for {provider_id}")
            
            raise
    
    # ==========================================
    # PROVIDER-SPECIFIC API CALLS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def _call_gemini(
        self,
        account: str,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Google Gemini API"""
        import google.generativeai as genai
        
        # Get API key based on account
        api_key = getattr(settings, f"GEMINI_API_KEY_{account.split('_')[-1].upper()}", settings.GEMINI_API_KEY)
        
        genai.configure(api_key=api_key)
        model = genai.GenerativeModel('gemini-pro')
        
        # Build content
        content = prompt
        if system_prompt:
            content = f"{system_prompt}\n\n{prompt}"
        
        response = model.generate_content(
            content,
            generation_config=genai.types.GenerationConfig(
                max_output_tokens=max_tokens,
                temperature=temperature
            )
        )
        
        return {
            "text": response.text,
            "tokens_used": response.usage_metadata.total_token_count if hasattr(response, 'usage_metadata') else 0,
            "model": "gemini-pro"
        }
    
    async def _call_groq(
        self,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Groq API (ultra-fast)"""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = {
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {settings.GROQ_API_KEY}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            }
            
            messages = []
            if system_prompt:
                messages.append({"role": "system", "content": system_prompt})
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": prompt})
            
            response = await client.post(
                "https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions",
                headers=headers,
                json={
                    "model": "mixtral-8x7b-32768",  # Fast and cheap
                    "messages": messages,
                    "max_tokens": max_tokens,
                    "temperature": temperature
                },
                timeout=30.0
            )
            
            data = response.json()
            return {
                "text": data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"],
                "tokens_used": data["usage"]["total_tokens"],
                "model": data["model"]
            }
    
    async def _call_fireworks(
        self,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Fireworks AI"""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = {
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {settings.FIREWORKS_API_KEY}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            }
            
            messages = []
            if system_prompt:
                messages.append({"role": "system", "content": system_prompt})
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": prompt})
            
            response = await client.post(
                "https://api.fireworks.ai/inference/v1/chat/completions",
                headers=headers,
                json={
                    "model": "accounts/fireworks/models/mixtral-8x7b-instruct",
                    "messages": messages,
                    "max_tokens": max_tokens,
                    "temperature": temperature
                },
                timeout=60.0
            )
            
            data = response.json()
            return {
                "text": data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"],
                "tokens_used": data.get("usage", {}).get("total_tokens", 0),
                "model": "mixtral-8x7b-fireworks"
            }
    
    async def _call_openrouter(
        self,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call OpenRouter (free models)"""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = {
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {settings.OPENROUTER_API_KEY}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json",
                "HTTP-Referer": "https://rugmunch.io",
                "X-Title": "RMI Platform"
            }
            
            messages = []
            if system_prompt:
                messages.append({"role": "system", "content": system_prompt})
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": prompt})
            
            # Use free models from OpenRouter
            response = await client.post(
                "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions",
                headers=headers,
                json={
                    "model": "meta-llama/llama-3.1-8b-instruct:free",  # Free tier
                    "messages": messages,
                    "max_tokens": max_tokens,
                    "temperature": temperature
                },
                timeout=60.0
            )
            
            data = response.json()
            return {
                "text": data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"],
                "tokens_used": data.get("usage", {}).get("total_tokens", 0),
                "model": "llama-3.1-8b-free"
            }
    
    async def _call_deepseek(
        self,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call DeepSeek API ($5 credit)"""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = {
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {settings.DEEPSEEK_API_KEY}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            }
            
            messages = []
            if system_prompt:
                messages.append({"role": "system", "content": system_prompt})
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": prompt})
            
            response = await client.post(
                "https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions",
                headers=headers,
                json={
                    "model": "deepseek-chat",
                    "messages": messages,
                    "max_tokens": max_tokens,
                    "temperature": temperature
                },
                timeout=60.0
            )
            
            data = response.json()
            return {
                "text": data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"],
                "tokens_used": data.get("usage", {}).get("total_tokens", 0),
                "model": "deepseek-chat"
            }
    
    async def _call_nvidia(self, prompt: str, max_tokens: int, temperature: float) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call NVIDIA NIM API (free tier)"""
        # Implementation for NVIDIA API
        pass
    
    async def _call_mistral(
        self,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Mistral API"""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = {
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {settings.MISTRAL_API_KEY}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            }
            
            messages = [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}]
            if system_prompt:
                messages.insert(0, {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt})
            
            response = await client.post(
                "https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions",
                headers=headers,
                json={
                    "model": "mistral-medium",
                    "messages": messages,
                    "max_tokens": max_tokens,
                    "temperature": temperature
                },
                timeout=30.0
            )
            
            data = response.json()
            return {
                "text": data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"],
                "tokens_used": data.get("usage", {}).get("total_tokens", 0),
                "model": "mistral-medium"
            }
    
    async def _call_together(
        self,
        prompt: str,

        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Together AI ($5 credit)"""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = {
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {settings.TOGETHER_API_KEY}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            }
            
            response = await client.post(
                "https://api.together.xyz/v1/chat/completions",
                headers=headers,
                json={
                    "model": "togethercomputer/llama-2-70b-chat",
                    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
                    "max_tokens": max_tokens,
                    "temperature": temperature
                },
                timeout=60.0
            )
            
            data = response.json()
            return {
                "text": data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"],
                "tokens_used": data.get("usage", {}).get("total_tokens", 0),
                "model": "llama-2-70b"
            }
    
    async def _call_cohere(self, prompt: str, max_tokens: int, temperature: float) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Cohere API (free tier)"""
        # Implementation for Cohere
        pass
    
    async def _call_perplexity(
        self,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Perplexity API (free tier)"""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = {
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {settings.PERPLEXITY_API_KEY}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            }
            
            response = await client.post(
                "https://api.perplexity.ai/chat/completions",
                headers=headers,
                json={
                    "model": "llama-3.1-sonar-small-128k-online",
                    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
                    "max_tokens": max_tokens,
                    "temperature": temperature
                },
                timeout=30.0
            )
            
            data = response.json()
            return {
                "text": data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"],
                "tokens_used": data.get("usage", {}).get("total_tokens", 0),
                "model": "perplexity-sonar"
            }
    
    # ==========================================
    # HIGH-LEVEL API
    # ==========================================
    
    async def complete(
        self,
        task_type: TaskType,
        prompt: str,
        system_prompt: str = None,
        max_tokens: int = 1000,
        temperature: float = 0.7,
        priority: Priority = Priority.FREE_PREFERRED
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """
        Main entry point - route and execute request intelligently
        """
        # Get routing decision
        decision = await self.route_request(
            task_type=task_type,
            prompt=prompt,
            priority=priority
        )
        
        logger.info(f"Routing {task_type.value} to {decision.provider} (cost: ${decision.estimated_cost:.6f})")
        
        # Try primary
        try:
            result = await self.execute_request(
                provider_id=decision.provider,
                prompt=prompt,
                max_tokens=max_tokens,
                temperature=temperature,
                system_prompt=system_prompt
            )
            result["routing_decision"] = asdict(decision)
            return result
            
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Primary provider {decision.provider} failed: {e}")
            
            # Try fallbacks
            for fallback in decision.fallback_chain:
                try:
                    logger.info(f"Trying fallback: {fallback}")
                    result = await self.execute_request(
                        provider_id=fallback,
                        prompt=prompt,
                        max_tokens=max_tokens,
                        temperature=temperature,
                        system_prompt=system_prompt
                    )
                    result["routing_decision"] = asdict(decision)
                    result["fallback_used"] = fallback
                    return result
                except Exception as e2:
                    logger.error(f"Fallback {fallback} failed: {e2}")
                    continue
            
            # All failed
            raise Exception(f"All providers failed for task {task_type.value}")
    
    # ==========================================
    # MONITORING & REPORTING
    # ==========================================
    
    async def get_usage_report(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get comprehensive usage report"""
        total_cost_today = sum(s.cost_today for s in self.usage_stats.values())
        total_requests_today = sum(s.requests_today for s in self.usage_stats.values())
        
        provider_breakdown = []
        for provider_id, stats in self.usage_stats.items():
            config = AI_PROVIDERS.get(provider_id)
            if stats.requests_today > 0:
                provider_breakdown.append({
                    "provider": provider_id,
                    "requests": stats.requests_today,
                    "cost": stats.cost_today,
                    "avg_cost_per_request": stats.cost_today / stats.requests_today if stats.requests_today > 0 else 0,
                    "remaining_credits": config.current_credits - stats.cost_today if not config.is_free_tier else float('inf'),
                    "is_free": config.is_free_tier
                })
        
        # Calculate runway
        daily_burn_rate = total_cost_today
        if daily_burn_rate > 0:
            total_credits = sum(
                AI_PROVIDERS[p].current_credits 
                for p in AI_PROVIDERS 
                if not AI_PROVIDERS[p].is_free_tier
            )
            days_remaining = total_credits / daily_burn_rate
        else:
            days_remaining = float('inf')
        
        return {
            "date": datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            "total_requests_today": total_requests_today,
            "total_cost_today": total_cost_today,
            "provider_breakdown": sorted(provider_breakdown, key=lambda x: x['cost'], reverse=True),
            "estimated_days_remaining": days_remaining,
            "free_tier_usage": {p: s.requests_today for p, s in self.usage_stats.items() if AI_PROVIDERS[p].is_free_tier and s.requests_today > 0}
        }


# Singleton
ai_router = AIRouterService()
"}

"""
AI Router Service - Intelligent Multi-Provider Routing
======================================================
Maximizes free tiers, tracks costs, prevents overages.
"""
import asyncio
import time
import json
import logging
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any, Tuple
from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from enum import Enum
import httpx
import hashlib
from collections import defaultdict
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi')
from setup_supabase import supabase

sys.path.insert(0, '/root/rmi/backend')
from config.ai_router_config import (
    AI_PROVIDERS, TASK_MODEL_MAPPING, COST_STRATEGIES,
    TaskType, Priority, ModelConfig
)
from config.settings import settings

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


@dataclass
class UsageStats:
    """Tracks usage for a provider"""
    provider: str
    requests_today: int = 0
    tokens_in_today: int = 0
    tokens_out_today: int = 0
    cost_today: float = 0.0
    requests_total: int = 0
    cost_total: float = 0.0
    last_used: Optional[datetime] = None
    error_count: int = 0
    last_error: Optional[str] = None
    circuit_open: bool = False
    circuit_open_until: Optional[datetime] = None


@dataclass
class RoutingDecision:
    """Result of routing decision"""
    provider: str
    model: str
    estimated_cost: float
    reason: str
    fallback_chain: List[str]
    confidence: float


class AIRouterService:
    """
    Intelligent AI API Router
    Routes requests to cheapest/best provider based on task, cost, availability
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.supabase = supabase
        self.usage_stats: Dict[str, UsageStats] = {}
        self.request_queue: asyncio.Queue = asyncio.Queue()
        self.is_running = False
        self._initialize_providers()
        
    def _initialize_providers(self):
        """Initialize usage tracking for all providers"""
        for provider_id, config in AI_PROVIDERS.items():
            self.usage_stats[provider_id] = UsageStats(provider=provider_id)
        
        # Load historical stats from DB
        self._load_usage_stats()
    
    def _load_usage_stats(self):
        """Load usage stats from database"""
        try:
            today = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
            result = self.supabase.table("ai_provider_usage").select("*").eq("date", today).execute()
            
            for row in result.data or []:
                provider = row.get("provider")
                if provider in self.usage_stats:
                    self.usage_stats[provider].requests_today = row.get("requests", 0)
                    self.usage_stats[provider].cost_today = row.get("cost", 0.0)
                    self.usage_stats[provider].tokens_in_today = row.get("tokens_in", 0)
                    self.usage_stats[provider].tokens_out_today = row.get("tokens_out", 0)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error loading usage stats: {e}")
    
    async def _save_usage_stats(self):
        """Save usage stats to database"""
        try:
            today = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
            
            for provider_id, stats in self.usage_stats.items():
                data = {
                    "provider": provider_id,
                    "date": today,
                    "requests": stats.requests_today,
                    "cost": stats.cost_today,
                    "tokens_in": stats.tokens_in_today,
                    "tokens_out": stats.tokens_out_today,
                    "updated_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
                }
                
                # Upsert
                self.supabase.table("ai_provider_usage").upsert(data).execute()
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error saving usage stats: {e}")
    
    # ==========================================
    # ROUTING LOGIC
    # ==========================================
    
    async def route_request(
        self,
        task_type: TaskType,
        prompt: str,
        priority: Priority = Priority.FREE_PREFERRED,
        required_quality: float = None,
        max_cost: float = None,
        timeout_ms: int = 30000
    ) -> RoutingDecision:
        """
        Determine best provider for a request
        
        Algorithm:
        1. Get candidates for task type
        2. Filter by availability (circuit breaker, rate limits)
        3. Sort by cost (free first, then cheapest)
        4. Filter by quality if specified
        5. Return best match with fallback chain
        """
        
        # Get task mapping
        task_mapping = TASK_MODEL_MAPPING.get(task_type, {
            "primary": ["gemini_primary", "openrouter_free"],
            "backup": ["groq", "fireworks"],
            "min_quality": 6.0,
            "priority": Priority.FREE_PREFERRED
        })
        
        # Combine primary and backup
        all_candidates = task_mapping["primary"] + task_mapping["backup"]
        
        # Filter and score candidates
        scored_candidates = []
        
        for provider_id in all_candidates:
            if provider_id not in AI_PROVIDERS:
                continue
            
            config = AI_PROVIDERS[provider_id]
            stats = self.usage_stats[provider_id]
            
            # Check circuit breaker
            if stats.circuit_open:
                if stats.circuit_open_until and datetime.now() > stats.circuit_open_until:
                    stats.circuit_open = False
                else:
                    continue
            
            # Check if provider is available (has credits or free)
            if not config.is_free_tier and stats.cost_today >= config.current_credits:
                continue
            
            # Check free tier limits
            if config.free_tier_limit and stats.requests_today >= config.free_tier_limit:
                continue
            
            # Check rate limits
            if stats.last_used:
                time_since_last = (datetime.now() - stats.last_used).total_seconds()
                min_interval = 60 / config.rate_limit_rpm
                if time_since_last < min_interval:
                    continue
            
            # Calculate score (lower is better)
            cost_score = config.cost_per_1k_tokens if not config.is_free_tier else 0
            quality_score = 10 - config.quality_score  # Invert (lower better)
            reliability_penalty = 0 if config.reliability_score > 7 else 2
            
            # Penalize if errors recently
            error_penalty = stats.error_count * 0.5
            
            total_score = cost_score + quality_score + reliability_penalty + error_penalty
            
            scored_candidates.append((provider_id, total_score, config))
        
        # Sort by score
        scored_candidates.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
        
        if not scored_candidates:
            # Emergency fallback - use any available
            return RoutingDecision(
                provider="gemini_primary",
                model="gemini-pro",
                estimated_cost=0.0,
                reason="Emergency fallback - no optimal providers available",
                fallback_chain=[],
                confidence=0.5
            )
        
        # Select best
        best_provider_id, best_score, best_config = scored_candidates[0]
        
        # Build fallback chain (next 3 best)
        fallback_chain = [c[0] for c in scored_candidates[1:4]]
        
        # Calculate estimated cost
        estimated_tokens = len(prompt.split()) * 1.5  # Rough estimate
        estimated_cost = (estimated_tokens / 1000) * best_config.cost_per_1k_tokens
        
        return RoutingDecision(
            provider=best_provider_id,
            model=best_config.name,
            estimated_cost=estimated_cost,
            reason=f"Selected based on cost={best_config.cost_per_1k_tokens}, quality={best_config.quality_score}, reliability={best_config.reliability_score}",
            fallback_chain=fallback_chain,
            confidence=0.9 if best_config.reliability_score > 8 else 0.7
        )
    
    # ==========================================
    # REQUEST EXECUTION
    # ==========================================
    
    async def execute_request(
        self,
        provider_id: str,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int = 1000,
        temperature: float = 0.7,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Execute request to specific provider"""
        
        if provider_id not in AI_PROVIDERS:
            raise ValueError(f"Unknown provider: {provider_id}")
        
        config = AI_PROVIDERS[provider_id]
        stats = self.usage_stats[provider_id]
        
        start_time = time.time()
        
        try:
            # Route to appropriate handler
            if config.provider == "google":
                response = await self._call_gemini(provider_id, prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "groq":
                response = await self._call_groq(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "fireworks":
                response = await self._call_fireworks(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "openrouter":
                response = await self._call_openrouter(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "nvidia":
                response = await self._call_nvidia(prompt, max_tokens, temperature)
            elif config.provider == "mistral":
                response = await self._call_mistral(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "together":
                response = await self._call_together(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            elif config.provider == "cohere":
                response = await self._call_cohere(prompt, max_tokens, temperature)
            elif config.provider == "perplexity":
                response = await self._call_perplexity(prompt, max_tokens, temperature)
            elif config.provider == "deepseek":
                response = await self._call_deepseek(prompt, max_tokens, temperature, system_prompt)
            else:
                raise ValueError(f"Unknown provider type: {config.provider}")
            
            # Update stats
            elapsed = time.time() - start_time
            tokens_used = response.get("tokens_used", len(prompt.split()) + max_tokens)
            cost = (tokens_used / 1000) * config.cost_per_1k_tokens
            
            stats.requests_today += 1
            stats.requests_total += 1
            stats.cost_today += cost
            stats.cost_total += cost
            stats.tokens_out_today += tokens_used
            stats.last_used = datetime.now()
            stats.error_count = 0
            
            # Save stats periodically
            if stats.requests_today % 10 == 0:
                await self._save_usage_stats()
            
            return {
                "success": True,
                "provider": provider_id,
                "response": response.get("text", ""),
                "tokens_used": tokens_used,
                "cost": cost,
                "latency_ms": elapsed * 1000,
                "model": response.get("model", config.name)
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            # Update error stats
            stats.error_count += 1
            stats.last_error = str(e)
            
            # Circuit breaker logic
            if stats.error_count >= 5:
                stats.circuit_open = True
                stats.circuit_open_until = datetime.now() + timedelta(minutes=5)
                logger.warning(f"Circuit opened for {provider_id}")
            
            raise
    
    # ==========================================
    # PROVIDER-SPECIFIC API CALLS
    # ==========================================
    
    async def _call_gemini(
        self,
        account: str,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Google Gemini API"""
        import google.generativeai as genai
        
        # Get API key based on account
        api_key = getattr(settings, f"GEMINI_API_KEY_{account.split('_')[-1].upper()}", settings.GEMINI_API_KEY)
        
        genai.configure(api_key=api_key)
        model = genai.GenerativeModel('gemini-pro')
        
        # Build content
        content = prompt
        if system_prompt:
            content = f"{system_prompt}\n\n{prompt}"
        
        response = model.generate_content(
            content,
            generation_config=genai.types.GenerationConfig(
                max_output_tokens=max_tokens,
                temperature=temperature
            )
        )
        
        return {
            "text": response.text,
            "tokens_used": response.usage_metadata.total_token_count if hasattr(response, 'usage_metadata') else 0,
            "model": "gemini-pro"
        }
    
    async def _call_groq(
        self,
        prompt: str,
        max_tokens: int,
        temperature: float,
        system_prompt: str = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Call Groq API (ultra-fast)"""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            headers = {
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {settings.GROQ_API_KEY}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            }
            
            messages = []
            if system_prompt:
                messages.append({"role": "system", "content": system_prompt})
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": prompt})
            
            response = await client.post(
                "https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions",
                headers=headers,
                json={
                    "model": "mixtral-8x7b-32768",  # Fast and cheap
                    "messages": messages,
                    "max_tokens": max_tokens,
                    "temperature": temperature
                },
                timeout=30.0
            )
            
            data = response.json()
            return {
